headline: X-Ray and Stress evidence point to concentrated growth-equity sensitivity with partial defensive ballast.
boundaryNote: Stress scenarios are diagnostic tests, not forecasts.

items.title: Largest risk driver
items.summary: SPY and QQQ create overlapping US equity and growth-factor exposure.

items.title: Rates up shock
items.summary: Bond sleeve absorbs some equity drawdown, but total portfolio remains exposed.

items.title: Primary problem class
items.summary: The issue is not missing return; it is dependence on a narrow equity growth path.

items.title: Input completeness
items.summary: All sample holdings include ticker, label, and allocation weight.
